languages.text: {n}Когда вы делитесь выводами с сенешалем, он кивает.{/n} "Соглашусь, Ваша Светлость. По долгу службы мне пришлось прочесть немало свитков из династического архива, и ни в одном из них нет упоминания о еретических наклонностях Себериана".

{n}When you share your conclusions with the Seneschal, he nods.{/n} "I agree, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I have had cause to read a good many scrolls from the dynastic archives in the course of my duties, and there was never any mention of Seberian's heretical tendencies."
languages.original_text: {n}Когда вы делитесь выводами с сенешалем, он кивает.{/n} "Соглашусь, Ваша Светлость. По долгу службы мне пришлось прочесть немало свитков из династического архива, и ни в одном из них нет упоминания о еретических наклонностях Себериана".

traits.locale_text: {n}When you share your conclusions with the Seneschal, he nods.{/n} "I agree, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I have had cause to read a good many scrolls from the dynastic archives in the course of my duties, and there was never any mention of Seberian's heretical tendencies."

{n}When you share your conclusions with the Seneschal, he nods.{/n} "I agree, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I have had cause to read a good many scrolls from the dynastic archives in the course of my duties, and there was never any mention of Seberian's heretical tendencies."

{n}When you share your conclusions with the Seneschal, he nods.{/n} "I agree, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I have had cause to read a good many scrolls from the dynastic archives in the course of my duties, and there was never any mention of Seberian's heretical tendencies."

languages.text: {n}当你将自己的结论告知总领时，他点了点头。{/n}“我同意您的看法，舰长大人。我在履行职责时，曾因故翻阅过不少王朝档案的卷宗，其中确实从未提及塞贝里安有异端主义倾向。”
languages.original_text: {n}When you share your conclusions with the Seneschal, he nods.{/n} "I agree, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I have had cause to read a good many scrolls from the dynastic archives in the course of my duties, and there was never any mention of Seberian's heretical tendencies."

traits.locale_text: {n}当你将自己的结论告知总领时，他点了点头。{/n}“我同意您的看法，舰长大人。我在履行职责时，曾因故翻阅过不少王朝档案的卷宗，其中确实从未提及塞贝里安有异端主义倾向。”

languages.text: {n}Le sénéchal acquiesce lorsque vous lui faites part de vos conclusions.{/n} « Je suis d'accord, Votre Seigneurie. J'ai été amené à lire bon nombre des parchemins entreposés aux archives de la dynastie dans le cadre de mon travail, et nulle part il n'y est fait mention des tendances hérétiques de Seberian. »
languages.original_text: {n}When you share your conclusions with the Seneschal, he nods.{/n} "I agree, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I have had cause to read a good many scrolls from the dynastic archives in the course of my duties, and there was never any mention of Seberian's heretical tendencies."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le sénéchal acquiesce lorsque vous lui faites part de vos conclusions.{/n} « Je suis d'accord, Votre Seigneurie. J'ai été amené à lire bon nombre des parchemins entreposés aux archives de la dynastie dans le cadre de mon travail, et nulle part il n'y est fait mention des tendances hérétiques de Seberian. »

languages.text: {n}Vardığın sonuçları paylaştığında Seneşal, başını sallayarak karşılık veriyor.{/n} "Katılıyorum {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Vazifelerim sırasında hanedanlık arşivlerinden epeyce parşömen okuma fırsatı bulmuştum. Seberian'ın kâfirlik eğilimlerinden de hiç bahsedilmiyordu."
languages.original_text: {n}When you share your conclusions with the Seneschal, he nods.{/n} "I agree, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I have had cause to read a good many scrolls from the dynastic archives in the course of my duties, and there was never any mention of Seberian's heretical tendencies."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vardığın sonuçları paylaştığında Seneşal, başını sallayarak karşılık veriyor.{/n} "Katılıyorum {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Vazifelerim sırasında hanedanlık arşivlerinden epeyce parşömen okuma fırsatı bulmuştum. Seberian'ın kâfirlik eğilimlerinden de hiç bahsedilmiyordu."

languages.text: {n}Cuando compartes tus conclusiones con tu Senescal, asiente.{/n} «Estoy de acuerdo, mi{mf|lord|lady}. He tenido motivos para leer gran parte de los archivos de la dinastía durante el cumplimiento de mi deber, y nunca he visto mención alguna de tendencias herejes por parte de Seberian».
languages.original_text: {n}When you share your conclusions with the Seneschal, he nods.{/n} "I agree, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I have had cause to read a good many scrolls from the dynastic archives in the course of my duties, and there was never any mention of Seberian's heretical tendencies."

traits.locale_text: {n}Cuando compartes tus conclusiones con tu Senescal, asiente.{/n} «Estoy de acuerdo, mi{mf|lord|lady}. He tenido motivos para leer gran parte de los archivos de la dinastía durante el cumplimiento de mi deber, y nunca he visto mención alguna de tendencias herejes por parte de Seberian».

languages.text: {n}Als du deine Schlussfolgerungen mit dem Truchsess teilst, nickt er.{/n} "Dem kann ich nur zustimmen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ich habe im Rahmen meiner Pflichten zahlreiche Schriftrollen aus den dynastischen Archiven gelesen, aber von Seberians ketzerischen Neigungen war nie die Rede."
languages.original_text: {n}When you share your conclusions with the Seneschal, he nods.{/n} "I agree, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I have had cause to read a good many scrolls from the dynastic archives in the course of my duties, and there was never any mention of Seberian's heretical tendencies."

traits.locale_text: {n}Als du deine Schlussfolgerungen mit dem Truchsess teilst, nickt er.{/n} "Dem kann ich nur zustimmen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ich habe im Rahmen meiner Pflichten zahlreiche Schriftrollen aus den dynastischen Archiven gelesen, aber von Seberians ketzerischen Neigungen war nie die Rede.

languages.text: {n}結論を執政官に伝えると、彼は頷いた。{/n}「私も同意します、御{mf|殿|女}様。職務上、王朝史料を数多く読んできましたが、セベリアンの異端的な傾向については一度も触れられていませんでした。」
languages.original_text: {n}When you share your conclusions with the Seneschal, he nods.{/n} "I agree, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I have had cause to read a good many scrolls from the dynastic archives in the course of my duties, and there was never any mention of Seberian's heretical tendencies."

traits.locale_text: {n}結論を執政官に伝えると、彼は頷いた。{/n}「私も同意します、御{mf|殿|女}様。職務上、王朝史料を数多く読んできましたが、セベリアンの異端的な傾向については一度も触れられていませんでした。」
